# GrowSK Tech — AI Context File

## Company
- Name: GrowSK Tech
- Website: https://www.growsktech.com
- Location: Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, Canada
- Contact: hello@growsktech.com

## What We Do
GrowSK Tech is a Saskatchewan digital agency that builds lead-generation websites, runs Google Ads campaigns, manages local SEO, and develops custom apps and AI tools for service businesses across Saskatchewan.

## Service Areas
- Saskatoon, Saskatchewan (primary)
- Regina, Saskatchewan (primary)
- Prince Albert, Saskatchewan
- Moose Jaw, Saskatchewan
- All of Saskatchewan (province-wide)

## Services
1. Web Design — Lead-generation websites launched in 48–72 hours, copywriting included, local SEO foundation built in
2. Google Ads — Search campaign management, dedicated landing pages, call tracking, monthly optimization
3. Local SEO — Google Business Profile management, map pack rankings, citations, review strategy, local service pages
4. App Development — Custom booking systems, client portals, quote calculators, staff dashboards
5. Custom Software — CRMs, workflow automation, reporting dashboards, operational tools
6. AI Tools — Lead qualification assistants, customer support bots, proposal drafting tools, internal automation
7. Digital Marketing — Full-stack growth systems combining website, ads, SEO, and tracking

## Industries Served
- Plumbers
- HVAC companies
- Electricians
- Renovation and construction contractors
- Dental clinics
- Physiotherapy and chiropractic clinics
- Med spas and wellness practices
- Lawyers and law firms
- Accountants and CPA practices
- Financial advisors
- Immigration consultants
- Professional services firms

## Ideal Customers
Service businesses in Saskatchewan where one booked job covers the monthly marketing investment. Businesses where customers search Google before hiring. Owner-operated companies with 1–50 employees looking for a single agency to own their entire digital presence.

## Key Value Propositions
- Websites launched in 48–72 hours (not 6 weeks)
- Copywriting always included
- Full call and form tracking from day one
- No long-term contracts
- Saskatchewan-based — understands the local market
